ham: Hey! Swiggy’s offering 20% off on all orders today. Use code SWIGGY20 at checkout. Hurry, limited time!
spam: Hey! Apka eSIM upgrade pending hai. Agar aapne abhi tak clik nahi kiya, to aapka SIM service block ho sakti hai. Click <URL> to updte your account and get 30% off on next plan. Urgently!
